what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links the design-assets channel to an image asset named Markup_Gold.
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an attachment_type of images.
The target is an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/icons/Markup_Gold.
It includes an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
The id uses an att- prefix.
standouts: References a specific image asset (Markup_Gold) via a custom image:// URI.
Serves as a typed attachment record rather than code or design documentation.
concerns: No title, caption, or description for the attachment.
The image:// URI cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone.
No content hash or checksum for the referenced asset.
No recorded author or source for who/what added the attachment.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Uses an id prefix att- for attachment records.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone.
Uses a URI-style target field for resource location.
notes: A minimal attachment ledger entry that ties the design-assets channel to the Markup_Gold icon image.
questions: What does the Markup_Gold icon depict or represent?
Is the referenced image://design-assets/icons/Markup_Gold asset guaranteed to exist?
Who or what process added this attachment?
How is the attachment intended to be used by consumers of the design-assets channel?
apparent_themes: Asset cataloging through typed attachment records.
intention_signals: Register the Markup_Gold icon as a discoverable image attachment under the design-assets channel.
novelty: Uses a custom image:// URI scheme as the target for an attachment record, separating attachment metadata from the asset itself.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel and a specific image asset, allowing systems to look up or enumerate image attachments by id without embedding the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record with id att-b173a8f4 in the design-assets channel that targets the image://design-assets/icons/Markup_Gold asset and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register the Markup_Gold icon image as an attachment accessible through the design-assets channel.
